title: Fix score pull command registration in score CLI group
description:
## Problem
`plexus score pull` is not registered on the correct Click group in `plexus/cli/score/scores.py`.

The decorator is currently:
- `@score.command()`

but the module registers commands on the `scores` group (e.g., `@scores.command()`). This prevents expected pull command behavior/discovery.

## Expected
- `pull` is registered with the same group as other score subcommands.
- `plexus score pull ...` is available and routes to the pull handler.

## Scope
- Update the command decorator to register `pull` on `scores`.
- Validate CLI command availability locally.

## Definition of Done
- Decorator uses `@scores.command()`.
- Local validation confirms `pull` appears in score CLI commands.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting fix. Confirmed current diff changes  to  for pull registration. Next: validate CLI command discovery and open PR.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Starting fix. Confirmed current local diff switches pull registration from `@score.command()` to `@scores.command()`.

Next steps:
- validate CLI command discovery locally
- commit fix + Kanbus artifacts on a dedicated bugfix branch
- push and open PR to `develop`

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Implemented fix on branch `bugfix/score-pull-command-registration` by registering pull under `@scores.command()`.

Local validation:
- `/home/derek/miniconda3/envs/py311/bin/python -m plexus.cli score --help`
- Output now includes `pull` in score subcommands.
